announcement.text: New: AI Review Summaries are live — turn every review into a sales pitch.

hero.eyebrow: The review app your storefront deserves
hero.subtitle: Collect, curate and display reviews that actually sell. Beautiful widgets, gentle automation, zero chaos.
hero.trustLine: Built for Shopify · Fast by default · Light on the eyes

valueGrid.subtitle: Every feature a growing store needs to build trust — bundled, polished, and shipped with taste.

cells.title: Photos & Videos
cells.description: Collect three times more visual reviews with prompts that feel like a friendly nudge, not a nag.

cells.title: Mobile-First Forms
cells.description: Nine out of ten shoppers review on phones. Our forms feel native on every one of them.

cells.title: Automated Moderation
cells.description: Spam, profanity and trolls get filtered before they ever touch your storefront.

cells.title: Custom Questions
cells.description: Ask about fit, colour, fragrance — anything — and display the answers as gorgeous attributes.

cells.title: Review Replies
cells.description: Turn every response into a public love letter that future shoppers will absolutely read.

cells.title: Customer Edits
cells.description: When you fix an issue, let customers update their rating in one tap — and watch your score rise.

cells.title: Multi-Store Sync
cells.description: Run several storefronts? Share a single pool of reviews across all of them, effortlessly.

cells.title: Powerful Analytics
cells.description: Know exactly which widgets convert, which questions land, and which reviews drive the most revenue.

cells.title: Developer API
cells.description: A clean REST API and webhooks for the teams who want to go absolutely wild with custom experiences.

widgetsShowcase.subtitle: Pick any widget, click install, and watch your trust score climb. Every card below is real — hover, poke, enjoy.

steps.title: Install in one click
steps.description: Add rayt.ca to Shopify, pick a theme, and every widget is ready to drop into your storefront.

steps.title: Collect on autopilot
steps.description: Perfectly timed, gentle review requests land in inboxes the moment your customers are happiest.

steps.title: Watch conversions climb
steps.description: Display your best reviews where it matters most and let social proof do the selling for you.

pricingTeaser.description: Every plan includes all 23 widgets, unlimited moderation, and real humans to help. You only pay when you grow.

contact.headline: A real human, on the other side.
contact.body: Pre-sales, onboarding, strategy or just a friendly hello — we reply, fast.

subscribe.headline: rayt.ca keeps getting better. Stay in the loop.
subscribe.body: One monthly note with product drops, new widgets and clever tricks from the team. Unsubscribe any time.

finalCta.subtitle: Install free, collect your first reviews today, and watch your store feel a little more alive by tomorrow.

stacking.headline: Five reasons shoppers believe what they see.
stacking.subtitle: The strongest form of social proof isn't words — it's photos, videos and faces.

cards.title: Gather photos, videos and stories shoppers trust.
cards.description: rayt.ca streamlines every step of review collection with perfectly timed requests and gentle incentives that multiply your visual submissions.

cards.title: Show off reviews without ever leaving the brand.
cards.description: From the PDP to the checkout, our widgets feel like they've always belonged — because they were built to.

cards.title: Let AI spotlight the phrases that actually sell.
cards.description: Automatically surface your best lines, translate for global shoppers, and summarize everything into one irresistible verdict.

cards.title: Turn every five-star moment into another sale.
cards.description: Built-in referrals, upsells and smart discounts make sure every happy customer becomes your next three.

cards.title: Take your social proof everywhere you sell.
cards.description: Syndicate your reviews to search, shopping feeds and your most important channels, automatically.
